title: G2PLUS 100 PCS Disposable Makeup Frosted Tip Spatula, 3.2'' x 0.6'' Makeup spatula, Cosmetic Spatula for Mixing and Sampling, Facial Stick Applying the Mask, Clay mask, Peel Pask, Serum Polypropylene
description:
About this item
Premium Material: These makeup spatulas are made of high-Quality Polypropylene, translucent color, smooth without nasty sharp bits. Great tool for face mask application
Package & Size: Package includes 100pcs makeup spoon spatula, enough quantity for you to use and change. Product size: 3.2'' x 0.59'' / 8cm x 1.5cm, easily suited for your daily needs and perfect for face mask
All-Rounder: These makeup scrapers can meet your every need, including applying your favorite cream/body cream, lotion, and more. and will not cause any damage to your bottle. The 100pcs makeup spatula is enough for your daily use and is cost-effective as a disposable product
Easy To Carry: These makeup scrapers are light and small without taking up a lot of space, easy to carry, can easily fit into pockets, bags, suitable for travel, home, personal care
Wide Application: These makeup scrapers are great for DIY makeup, makeup application, beauty product sampling, the beauty industry and more. Less mess and keeps your cosmetics clean from bacteria, clean and hygienic
reviews_5s:
Purchaed several bags and use these for mixing and spreading epoxies and polyurethanes. (Not for makeup) They are tapered in thickness along the length giving nice flex. The radius on the wand end is perfect for making small fillets. Top side has all rounded edges while bottom side has more sharp edges which is perfect since you can use it to scrape and smooth more or less aggressively based on your application. These really work well!These are exactly what I need. even sturdier than the one I had. I use these to feed my small senior dog who has health issues.i was using them to take out face mask product out of a tub. i don't want to stick my fingers and get germs in the tub, so i use one and toss it. very durable, good sized, and the zipper type bag it comes in is handy to not lose any. personally, it doesn't look like it actually contains 100 of them, but even if it has 50, it should last me at least a year and that's great considering the price.Just what I needed to scoop out powder or paste.
Use mainly for clay based deodorant in a jar.Sturdy small spatulas good for using in face products so as not to add bacteria into products.Duran muchísimos.This is great for my face masks and cream makeup remover. I hate the idea of dipping my hands into the pot of my products because it can spread bacteria, so these have been my godsend. I like that they were really cheap and arrived really fast.These paddles are very nice. I know they are classified as “disposable,” but I wash them after use, and then put them in a jar of vinegar and water to disinfect them. When the jar is almost full, I take the paddles out and air dry them. The paddles have many uses besides removing moisturizer out of its jar. I have used them for mixing essential oils, small amounts of craft paints, etc.I'm not using these for makeup application but for mixing resin for jewelry. Using small amount of resin, it's important to make sure each component is well mixed and then well combined. It's also a challenge to minimize the bubbles in the resin that are added during the mixing process. I've found these help me a little in that regard because they are small and don't get caught up on the cups at all. I also prefer these over the wooden sticks or spatulas because I can reuse them a few times.these are great quality! I used them to demo skin care products & they worked perfectly! If I had one complaint, that would be that I wish the handle was just a little bigger, but other than that, they were exactly what I was looking for!
